tasks.request: Replace the stub in backend/db/migrations/001_plans.sql with a complete SQL migration: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plans (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, price REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);  Add a rollback comment section at the bottom.
tasks.description: Full SQL migration for plans with constraints and indexes

tasks.request: Replace the stub in backend/services/plan-management.js with a complete service module for Plan Management. Export async functions: create_a_new_subscription_plan, retrieve_a_list_of_subscription_plans. Each function must accept validated input, query the SQLite database via require('../db/index').getDB(), and return structured results. APIs to cover: POST /plans: Create a new subscription plan; GET /plans: Retrieve a list of subscription plans.
tasks.description: Service layer for Plan Management with database queries

tasks.request: Replace the stub in backend/routes/plan-management.js with complete Express route handlers for: POST /plans: Create a new subscription plan; GET /plans: Retrieve a list of subscription plans. Import the service from backend/services/plan-management.js. Add input validation (check required fields, return 400 on missing). Return 201 for POST success, 200 for GET, 404 when not found, 500 on errors. Wrap every handler in try/catch.
tasks.description: Express route handlers for Plan Management with validation

tasks.request: Replace the stub in frontend/src/pages/dashboard.jsx with a complete React component for the Dashboard page. Use useState and useEffect hooks. Fetch data from the API using the axios client at ../api/client. Show a loading state while fetching. Display results in a table or list. Handle errors with an error message. Include a form for creating new entries if the feature has a POST endpoint.
tasks.description: React page component for Dashboard with data fetching

tasks.request: Create tests/features/plan-management.test.cjs with a node:test suite for the Plan Management feature. Import the express app from backend/server.js. Use http.request to call each route: POST /plans, GET /plans. Assert status codes and response shape. Include a beforeEach that resets test state.
tasks.description: Test suite for Plan Management routes

apis.description: Retrieve a list of subscription plans
